# Biocalcifiers

**Summary**: Organisms that produce calcium carbonate structures, such as gastropods and foraminifera.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] studied the resilience of biocalcifying organisms in the western Gulf.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Used as indicators of environmental stress in marine ecosystems.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Field sampling and laboratory thermal trials.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Both gastropods and ostracods showed elevated thermal tolerance when immersed. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 31]])
